contract: research sources, competitor notes, keyword/entity findings, source dates, evidence gaps

artifact.summary: Phase 1 RESEARCH for Pita Kabab (Palestinian Mediterranean, 3100 6th St SW, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404). 18 web sources consulted on 2026-07-12 (16 searches + 2 directory fetches) following the keyword-research specialist's 8-phase method. Direct CR-metro competitor set of 9 mapped plus 5 adjacent-metro players and 2 announced future entrants (The Halal Guys, Saj Grill). Keyword landscape: most non-brand local SERPs are aggregator-only (Yelp/TripAdvisor/DoorDash), meaning winnable; 'gyro' is the one entrenched-local-brand term (Gyro Hut since 2006). Standout entity findings: Pita Kabab is absent from both halal directories AI systems cite (Zabihah, HalalRun); the SW quadrant has no other Mediterranean/halal restaurant; Cedar Rapids has nationally significant halal/Muslim heritage entities (Mother Mosque 1934, Midamar 1974) supporting a durable halal-intent market and E-E-A-T content angles. No search-volume tool was available: every volume/difficulty metric is N/A by the omit-never-fabricate rule; prioritization is grounded in observed SERP composition and platform-listing existence only. Supporting detail in research-notes.md.

keywordEntityFindings.metricsDisclosure: No SEO tool, Search Console, or trends connector was available in this dispatch. Search volume, keyword difficulty, and CPC are N/A for every keyword below - omitted, not estimated as numbers. Prioritization basis is stated per row: SERP composition observed via WebSearch on 2026-07-12, platform-listing existence, or competitor page existence. Labels: Measured = direct SERP/fetch observation; Estimated = model inference; User-provided = from sealed brief/Phase 0.

keywords.keyword: mediterranean restaurant cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured (SERP 2026-07-12): aggregators + pitakababcr.com already top-3 organic; no entrenched local brand owns it

keywords.keyword: middle eastern restaurant cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured (SERP): Yelp mideastern category page exists; same aggregator-only composition

keywords.keyword: halal restaurant cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured (SERP + fetches): Yelp/Zabihah/HalalRun/DoorDash category pages dominate; zero CR-proper Mediterranean specialist listed on the halal directories; GATED on owner confirming halal certification (Phase 0 residue)

keywords.keyword: palestinian restaurant cedar rapids / palestinian food iowa
keywords.basis: Measured (SERP): no other Palestinian-identified restaurant surfaced in any CR search - uncontested differentiator; volume unknown, likely low but high-fit (Estimated)

keywords.keyword: shawarma cedar rapids / chicken shawarma cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured: Restaurant Guru lists only 2 CR shawarma restaurants; Yelp chicken-shawarma SERP exists; current answers are a grocery deli (Vytyl) and a non-specialist (Pepperjax)

keywords.keyword: kabob / kebab cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured: Pita Kabab already holds most top slots (brand-name match); Yelp kebab category exists; defend and consolidate

keywords.keyword: gyro cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured: Gyro Hut entrenched since 2006 (58 Yelp reviews, own domain) + Gyro Hut 2.0 + New York Gyro; hardest dish term - target via menu page, not a dedicated battle page

keywords.keyword: falafel cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured: Yelp falafel category exists; competition is O's Grill (food truck) and Rawlicious (wrap item); no falafel-specialist page found

keywords.keyword: hummus cedar rapids / baklava cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured: only Vytyl (market deli) surfaces for baklava; hummus has no dedicated local page found; low-competition dish pages

keywords.keyword: chicken over rice cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured: no CR-proper page found (NYC results bleed in); New York Gyro (unverified) and future Halal Guys are the natural owners - preempt with a menu-item page

keywords.keyword: family dinner deals cedar rapids / kids eat cheap
keywords.basis: User-provided (Phase 0): /family-dinner/ page already exists with kids $5.98 offer; SERP already surfaces it for kabob searches; no volume evidence (Estimated demand)

keywords.keyword: mediterranean food near me / halal food near me / shawarma near me (CR SW quadrant)
keywords.basis: Measured: SW quadrant has no other Mediterranean/halal restaurant in any observed list (closest: Gyro Hut 2.0, Greek); won via GBP + proximity; NOTE local-pack rankings were not observable with available tools (gap)

keywords.keyword: restaurants near eastern iowa airport (CID)
keywords.basis: Measured: TripAdvisor/Yelp/OpenTable landmark pages exist with no Mediterranean sit-down present; Pita Kabab's 6th St SW corridor position (District 23 at 2825 6th St SW corroborates corridor) makes a 'near CID' page credible; exact distance unverified (Estimated: same corridor)

keywords.keyword: restaurants near kirkwood community college
keywords.basis: Measured: TripAdvisor/Yelp near-pages exist; Gyro Hut 2.0 is the only Mediterranean-adjacent entry; student/staff lunch demand plausible (Estimated)

keywords.keyword: mediterranean catering cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured: pitakababcr.com already #1-observed organic result; competitors O's Grill/Julia's Kitchen/Zest + ezCater/The Knot aggregators; Pita Kabab not observed on ezCater (listing gap)

keywords.keyword: halal catering cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured: no dedicated local page found in any search; GATED on owner halal confirmation

keywords.keyword: wedding catering / corporate lunch catering / graduation party catering cedar rapids
keywords.basis: Measured: ezCater/The Knot hold the SERPs (aggregator-only); Phase 0 shows the catering page already claims these use cases (200+ guests, 50% deposit, 10-person min - owner must confirm terms before republishing)

keywords.keyword: iftar catering cedar rapids / ramadan catering
keywords.basis: Measured: CR iftar SERP contains ONLY prayer-time calculators - zero restaurant content; local Muslim community anchors (Mother Mosque, Islamic Center, MAS Iowa) evidence durable demand; Ramadan 2026 ran ~Feb 17-Mar 18 (islamicfinder.org), 2027 window earlier (Estimated) - publish ~1 month ahead

keywords.keyword: [category/dish] + Marion / Hiawatha / Fairfax / Ely / Swisher / Robins / Walford / Atkins
keywords.basis: Measured (anchor existence): standard metro ring; Pita'z holds Hiawatha, Taste of India holds Hiawatha/NE; no Mediterranean player holds Marion/Fairfax/Ely/Swisher; build only with unique local proof per page (doorway-page guard)

keywords.keyword: [category] + downtown / Czech Village / NewBo / Kingston Village / Westdale area / SW Cedar Rapids
keywords.basis: Measured (anchor existence): district pages (the-district.org, tourismcedarrapids.com) evidence the geography; NewBo is contested (Pita'z on-site); Westdale quadrant conflicting across sources - verify before asserting

keywords.keyword: best mediterranean food in cedar rapids (list-style)
keywords.basis: Measured: Facebook group question observed verbatim; Yelp/TripAdvisor 'best' pages exist; AI answers currently synthesize from aggregators where Pita Kabab is under-represented

keywords.keyword: shawarma vs gyro / what is shawarma / kabob vs kebab / what is palestinian food / is shawarma halal
keywords.basis: Estimated (pattern inference per specialist GEO-check: questions/definitions/comparisons are AI-answer-friendly); no local page answers these; pairs with charcoal-grill/vertical-spit differentiators from Phase 0

keywords.keyword: halal history of cedar rapids / oldest mosque in america food scene
keywords.basis: Measured (entity existence): Mother Mosque (1934), first national Muslim cemetery (1948), Islamic Center (1971), Midamar (1974) - unique E-E-A-T authority angle no competitor uses

differentiators.finding: Only Palestinian-identified restaurant surfaced in the CR metro across all searches
differentiators.basis: Measured (absence across 16 SERPs, 2026-07-12); claims themselves owner-unverified per Phase 0

differentiators.entity: Charcoal grill + vertical-spit shawarma + daily scratch prep

differentiators.basis: User-provided/Phase 0 unverified claims - confirm with owner before use as facts

citationSurfaces.actionImplication: Directory absence directly suppresses AI-answer visibility for halal/mediterranean queries; listing creation is a Phase 2+ action item gated on owner confirmations (halal certification, catering terms, ordering strategy)

clusters: halal heritage of Cedar Rapids authority article
suburb pages: Marion, Hiawatha, Fairfax, Ely, Swisher, Robins, Walford, Atkins

entities.matrixSizingGuidance: Core tier ~45-55 pages (8 service + 10 dish + 14 geo + 8 occasion + 10-15 GEO/FAQ) fits the 25-500 envelope. Dish-by-geo combinatorials only where each page carries unique local proof (testimonial, delivery-radius fact, occasion photo) - otherwise doorway-page/thin-content risk. NewBo geo pages compete with an on-site incumbent (Pita'z); prioritize SW/airport/Kirkwood/suburb-ring pages where no Mediterranean player exists.

quickWins: mediterranean catering cedar rapids - already #1-observed organic; harden the page, add occasion subpages (basis: SERP observation 2026-07-12)
shawarma cedar rapids - only 2 listed competitors, neither a Mediterranean sit-down specialist (basis: Restaurant Guru listing count)
palestinian restaurant cedar rapids - zero competing claimants observed (basis: absence across 16 SERPs)
Directory/entity fixes: create Zabihah + HalalRun + TripAdvisor + tourism-directory listings once owner confirms halal certification and identity facts (basis: direct fetches showing absence)
growth: halal restaurant cedar rapids - beat the aggregators before The Halal Guys/Saj Grill open CR locations (announced, undated)
near-CID-airport and near-Kirkwood pages - aggregator-only SERPs with no Mediterranean presence
suburb catering matrix pages (Marion, Fairfax, Ely, Swisher uncontested)
geoAiOpportunities: iftar/Ramadan catering content - zero local restaurant content on observed SERP; seasonal, publish ~1 month pre-Ramadan
halal-heritage-of-Cedar-Rapids authority article leveraging Mother Mosque/Midamar entities
shawarma-vs-gyro and what-is-Palestinian-food Q&A pages feeding AI answer boxes
